info.title: CyberAgent Workbench Local API
info.description: Authenticated loopback-only API owned by the Go control plane. Read operations expose durable metadata; separately authorized control capabilities permit exact active-call cancellation, non-authorizing execution-profile selection, idempotent creation of a closed workspace-bound Run, durable Run-bound Session steering, idempotent Run lifecycle transitions, and bounded execution through the Go Supervisor.

tags.name: System
tags.description: API discovery, health, and contract metadata.

tags.name: Models
tags.description: Redacted Go-owned Provider and model-route availability.

tags.name: Runs
tags.description: Durable Run state and Run-scoped projections.

tags.name: Agents
tags.description: Bounded Agent graph and operator-gated delegation projections.

tags.name: Analysis
tags.description: Read-only Fan-out plans and execution summaries.

tags.name: Reports
tags.description: Finding reports and redacted lifecycle evidence summaries.

tags.name: Sessions
tags.description: Persisted Session metadata and redacted messages.

tags.name: Workspaces
tags.description: Registered Workspace identities without local root paths.

get.description: Returns API and application versions plus top-level resources.
Returns content-free Artifact metadata and its integrity hash.
Returns bounded enablement metadata and Run wake worker health without bearer tokens, owner or lease identities, private errors, runtime enable controls, or persistent-service authority.
Reads the current SQLite schema version without mutating state.
Returns deterministic Provider registration and route metadata without API keys, base URLs, environment variable names, network probes, or model calls.
Returns only configured status and OS-store availability. It never reads credential plaintext into an API response.

post.summary: Set or delete an OS-owned Provider credential
post.description: Accepts one transient secret for direct storage in the OS credential manager, or deletes one exact Provider credential, then atomically reloads a Go-owned Provider Registry generation. Active calls retain their captured Provider and plaintext is never returned, persisted in SQLite, logged, or placed in an event.

202.description: Control request accepted or idempotently replayed

post.description: Makes at most one minimal no-tool model request after explicit confirmation. The response is content-free and never includes model text, raw Provider errors, credentials, or endpoint URLs.

202.description: Control request accepted or idempotently replayed

post.description: Persists one available Provider/model selection before updating the in-process Router. It does not call a model or expose credentials.

202.description: Control request accepted or idempotently replayed

get.description: Returns one redacted structured Note.
Returns the raw deterministic OpenAPI 3.1 JSON document under the same authentication boundary.

Returns a refreshable bounded history derived from terminal FileEdit apply, foreground Run wake, and inert Skill installation facts. It omits operation keys, paths, content digests, requester identities, lease identities, and package archive metadata.
Returns a bounded cursor page of durable Runs.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size from 1 to 100; defaults to 50

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor bound to this route and exact filter set

post.description: Atomically creates one Mission, interactive Run, active Session, closed Run mode, preview execution profile, root Agent, and initial events. The request cannot select a model, budget, network target, existing Session, process backend, or capability grant.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Opaque retry key; only a domain-separated digest is persisted

202.description: Control request accepted or idempotently replayed

get.description: Returns Run, Mission, checkpoint, tool usage, token-free execution-lease metadata, and read-only Plan/Delivery and external-Skill metadata projections when present.

post.description: Persists an audit-first cancellation request bound to the exact active Supervisor and model attempt. The worker consumes it with its private execution lease; clients never provide a fencing token.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Opaque operation key; only a domain-separated digest is persisted

202.description: Control request accepted or idempotently replayed

get.description: Returns root and Specialist projections plus completion summaries without lease or fencing state.

post.summary: Cancel an active Specialist model call
post.description: Persists an audit-first cancellation request bound to one exact Specialist AgentAttempt and model attempt. Only the worker holding that Attempt's private Run lease can observe and apply it.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Opaque operation key; only a domain-separated digest is persisted

202.description: Control request accepted or idempotently replayed

get.description: Returns at most one hundred pending approval metadata records and their bounded operator actions. Commands, file content, fingerprints, decision reasons, paths, capability grants, and execution authority are omitted.

post.summary: Approve once or deny a pending request
post.description: Applies an idempotent operator decision to one exact Run-bound approval. Approve-once is limited to Policy-rechecked dry-run Shell and process-disabled ScriptProcess proposals; file edits can only be denied. It never creates a Session grant, starts a real process, writes a file, starts Docker, or grants capability.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Opaque retry key; only a domain-separated digest is persisted

202.description: Control request accepted or idempotently replayed

get.description: Returns metadata and hashes only; Artifact content is never returned by HTTP.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size from 1 to 100; defaults to 50

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor bound to this route and exact filter set

parameters.name: source_id
parameters.description: Exact source proposal or invocation identity

get.description: Regenerates a metadata-only Code Run handoff from durable Plan, queue, change-set, verification, explicit per-item coverage, pending-action, and report records. Coverage preserves pass/fail/unknown counts without private summaries or an inferred aggregate result. The handoff performs no composite mutation, starts no execution, and grants no resume authority.

Builds a bounded Markdown or JSON download projection from one stable Code handoff snapshot. The response includes the durable source event high-water mark and SHA-256 of the exact content; it grants no resume, mutation, report-acceptance, or execution authority.
Returns proposal, review, application, and latest scheduling summaries without operation digests or review reasons.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size from 1 to 100; defaults to 50

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor bound to this route and exact filter set

get.description: Returns the ordered append-only Run event stream.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size from 1 to 100; defaults to 50

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor bound to this route and exact filter set

get.description: Returns one bounded append-only event batch using the same Run-bound high-water cursor as the SSE stream. Intended for embedded renderers without response streaming.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque final cursor from a previous poll or SSE frame

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum events returned in this bounded poll

get.description: Streams bounded durable Run events as SSE and resumes from a Run-bound cursor.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque Run-bound cursor from a previous SSE id; cannot be combined with Last-Event-ID

parameters.name: Last-Event-ID
parameters.description: SSE reconnect cursor from the final received frame; cannot be combined with cursor

get.description: Returns a bounded metadata-only inventory of immutable Workspace evidence attachments. It omits document and Session message content, operation keys, request fingerprints, requester identities, event sequence, and capability metadata.

post.description: Revalidates one exact redacted Workspace file projection and atomically appends it to the bound Session as tool-role evidence. Document text never becomes operator instruction and the operation starts no model, tool, process, or network call.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Opaque retry key; only a domain-separated digest is persisted

202.description: Control request accepted or idempotently replayed

post.summary: Execute a bounded queued Run batch
post.description: Freezes at most eight currently queued Session steering messages, then executes only those exact message identities through the Go RunSupervisor under one private execution lease. Retries replay the durable result and cannot consume messages appended after selection.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Opaque retry key; only a domain-separated digest is persisted

202.description: Control request accepted or idempotently replayed

post.description: Records operator intent for Preview, Docker, or local workspace execution. Selection never starts a process and never grants execution authority; backend-specific production gates remain mandatory.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Opaque operation key; only a domain-separated digest is persisted

202.description: Control request accepted or idempotently replayed

get.description: Returns Run-pinned external Skill names, versions, trust and bounded delivery counts without package content, paths, digests, installation identities, requester identities, or operation identities.
Returns bounded plan metadata and the latest shard execution summary without file manifests or model report JSON.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size from 1 to 100; defaults to 50

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor bound to this route and exact filter set

get.summary: Inspect a bounded multi-file change set
get.description: Returns status and size metadata for at most one hundred Run-bound FileEdits. Every review and apply remains independently authorized through the existing per-file endpoints; no batch mutation or atomic apply authority is introduced, and Diff content is omitted.

get.summary: Recover one durable pending FileEdit proposal
get.description: Returns integrity-checked original and proposed bodies for one exact pending Run-bound proposal, plus a stale-file flag. It issues no source handle and cannot mutate, approve, or apply the proposal.

get.summary: Issue an exact interactive edit source
get.description: Returns a complete unredacted bounded UTF-8 file body plus a short-lived opaque handle bound to the Run, Session, Workspace, path, and current hash. Redacted or truncated files are refused; issuing the handle writes nothing.

parameters.name: expected_sha256
parameters.description: Optional previously issued SHA-256 required when rotating an expired source handle

post.summary: Create a pending FileEdit from a Go-issued source
post.description: Consumes only an opaque Go-issued source handle and bounded text. It rechecks the exact file hash and Policy, creates a pending approval-backed FileEdit, and cannot approve or write the file.

202.description: Control request accepted or idempotently replayed

get.description: Returns at most one hundred Run-bound metadata-only file edit previews. Original and proposed file bodies are omitted and apply authority is always false.

get.summary: Inspect a Run file edit preview
get.description: Returns one exact Run-bound redacted diff without original or proposed file bodies.

post.description: Separately applies one exact Run-bound approved edit after fresh Run, Workspace, approval, Policy, path, and current-hash checks. The renderer supplies no path or file content, and retries replay the durable operation result.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Opaque retry key; only a domain-separated digest is persisted

202.description: Control request accepted or idempotently replayed

post.summary: Approve intent or deny a file edit
post.description: Records an exact Run-bound review decision. Approve-intent never writes the file; applying an approved edit remains a separate non-HTTP operation.

202.description: Control request accepted or idempotently replayed

post.summary: Start, pause, or resume a Run
post.description: Applies one exact idempotent Run lifecycle transition. Start atomically crosses created, preparing, and running; pause requires a quiescent Supervisor with no active execution lease; resume requires paused state. This operation never calls a model or tool.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Opaque retry key; only a domain-separated digest is persisted

202.description: Control request accepted or idempotently replayed

get.description: Returns structured, redacted Run Notes.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size from 1 to 100; defaults to 50

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor bound to this route and exact filter set

parameters.name: visibility
parameters.description: Repeat or comma-separate Note visibility values

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: Repeat or comma-separate normalized Note tags

get.description: Returns one bounded Go-owned projection of pending steering, approval, file-edit review/apply, and due wake facts. Items contain opaque identities and navigation destinations only; no operation key, command, prompt, Diff, path, content, digest, or execution authority is exposed.

post.description: Explicitly transitions a created or paused Run from Plan to Deliver only after an immutable operator selection exists. It does not resume the Run, start execution, call a model, or grant capability.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Opaque retry key; only a domain-separated digest is persisted

202.description: Control request accepted or idempotently replayed

post.description: Selects exactly one of a persisted proposal's three directions and atomically creates its bounded WorkItems and handoff Note. It does not change phase, start execution, call a model, or grant capability.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Opaque retry key; only a domain-separated digest is persisted

202.description: Control request accepted or idempotently replayed

get.description: Returns bounded report counts and severity summaries without Finding narratives.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size from 1 to 100; defaults to 50

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor bound to this route and exact filter set

get.description: Returns Findings and evidence references while omitting operator reasons, Evidence notes, digests, and Artifact content.
Returns persisted redacted structured-memory tool rounds and calls.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size from 1 to 100; defaults to 50

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor bound to this route and exact filter set

get.description: Returns at most one hundred exact Run/Session/Workspace-bound operator observations. Entries are secret-redacted and are neither model assertions, approvals, commands, nor execution authority.

post.description: Atomically records one secret-redacted immutable pass, fail, or unknown operator observation against the exact active Run Session and Workspace. It executes no command, accepts no model assertion, grants no approval, and authorizes no action.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Opaque retry key; only a domain-separated digest is persisted

202.description: Control request accepted or idempotently replayed

get.description: Returns at most fifty exact Code Run/Session/Workspace-bound operator checklists. Plans contain guidance only and cannot represent a result, model assertion, command, approval, or execution authority.

post.description: Atomically records one secret-redacted immutable operator checklist against the exact active Code Run Session and Workspace. It executes no command and has no outcome, pass inference, model assertion, approval, or action authority.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Opaque retry key; only a domain-separated digest is persisted

202.description: Control request accepted or idempotently replayed

post.summary: Associate evidence with one verification plan item
post.description: Appends one immutable operator association between an earlier checklist item and a later observation in the same active Code Run. It does not alter either record, execute the check, infer a result, call a model, approve an action, or grant authority.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Opaque retry key; only a domain-separated digest is persisted

202.description: Control request accepted or idempotently replayed

get.description: Derives bounded metadata-only per-item counts from immutable operator associations. It exposes explicit pass, fail, and unknown observation counts but infers no item result, rewrites no record, and grants no command, approval, or execution authority.

get.summary: Inspect evidence associations for one verification plan item
get.description: Returns one opaque, route-scoped page of exact metadata-only evidence references plus explicit pass, fail, and unknown counts for one immutable plan item. Private plan guidance, evidence bodies, operator identity, aggregate result inference, mutation, approval, commands, models, and authority are excluded.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size from 1 to 100; defaults to 50

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor bound to this route and exact filter set

get.description: Builds a deterministic bounded JSON or Markdown receipt from the current frozen association high-water for one exact verification plan item. It includes only opaque association references and explicit outcome counts; private plan/evidence bodies, operator identity, verdict inference, mutation, approval, command, model, and execution authority remain excluded.

Returns bounded metadata-only history proving that an operator retained exact deterministic verification snapshots. Snapshot/result acceptance, private bodies, operator identity, record rewriting, approval, authority, and execution remain false.

post.summary: Record one exact verification snapshot receipt
post.description: Rebuilds and digest-checks one current deterministic item snapshot before appending an immutable metadata-only receipt. Recording does not accept a snapshot or result, expose private bodies or operator identity, rewrite records, approve work, grant authority, or start execution.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Opaque retry key; only a domain-separated digest is persisted

202.description: Control request accepted or idempotently replayed

get.summary: Inspect the latest Run wake intent
get.description: Returns a closed-authority wake projection without lease owner or fencing metadata.

post.summary: Schedule a bounded Run wake intent
post.description: Persists bounded retry timing and single-owner intent for queued operator work. It does not start a background loop, model call, tool call, or Run execution.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Opaque retry key; only a domain-separated digest is persisted

202.description: Control request accepted or idempotently replayed

post.summary: Cancel an active Run wake intent
post.description: Cancels one active wake intent and revokes any current ownership lease without starting execution.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Opaque retry key; only a domain-separated digest is persisted

202.description: Control request accepted or idempotently replayed

post.summary: Consume one due Run wake intent
post.description: Explicitly claims one due wake generation and hands its bounded queued selection to the existing Go RunSupervisor. It starts no hidden worker or background loop; retries replay the generation-fenced durable handoff.

202.description: Control request accepted or idempotently replayed

get.description: Returns structured Work Board items.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size from 1 to 100; defaults to 50

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor bound to this route and exact filter set

get.description: Returns a bounded cursor page of persisted Sessions.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size from 1 to 100; defaults to 50

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor bound to this route and exact filter set

get.description: Returns Session metadata and its optional bound Run.
Returns persisted redacted messages.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size from 1 to 100; defaults to 50

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor bound to this route and exact filter set

post.description: Creates or replays one redacted durable operator-steering record for the exact Run-bound Session. It does not append Session history early, start or resume the Run, acquire a lease, call a model or tool, or grant a capability.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Opaque retry key; only a domain-separated digest is persisted

202.description: Control request accepted or idempotently replayed

post.description: Cancels one exact pending operator-steering message for the bound Session. Prepared, committed, and already consumed input is immutable; this operation does not stop a model call or start execution.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Opaque retry key; only a domain-separated digest is persisted

202.description: Control request accepted or idempotently replayed

post.description: Imports one explicitly confirmed, strictly validated, bounded archive into the content-addressed untrusted Skill Registry. Import executes no scripts, hooks, commands, tools, Provider calls, or network requests and grants no Run-selection or context-delivery authority.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Opaque retry key; only a domain-separated digest is persisted

202.description: Control request accepted or idempotently replayed

get.description: Returns one structured WorkItem.
Returns registered Workspace ids and names without local root paths.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size from 1 to 100; defaults to 50

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor bound to this route and exact filter set

get.description: Lists one directory level or returns a bounded redacted UTF-8 file preview. Go resolves the registered Workspace root, rejects traversal and symbolic links, omits internal staging files, and marks all content as non-authorizing evidence. Local root paths are never returned.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Canonical Workspace-relative path returned by a previous explorer response; defaults to the root

get.description: Compares two exact local commit objects through bounded tree metadata. The commits need not have an ancestor relationship. The response contains no author, body, blob, patch, remote, host path, rename inference, mutation, process, hook, network, or authority.

parameters.name: base_object_id
parameters.description: Exact lowercase base commit object identity

parameters.name: head_object_id
parameters.description: Exact lowercase head commit object identity

get.description: Compares one exact local commit object with its first parent and returns only bounded path, change-kind, file-kind, and content/mode-change metadata. It returns no author, body, blob, patch, remote, or host path and performs no checkout, ref update, process, hook, or network operation.

parameters.name: object_id
parameters.description: Exact lowercase forty-character Git commit object identity

get.summary: Preview one redacted file from an exact commit
get.description: Returns a bounded secret-redacted UTF-8 projection of one regular file from one exact local commit object. Links, binary data, oversized content, missing objects, raw blobs, host roots, remotes, checkout, ref mutation, processes, hooks, and network access are refused or excluded; returned text remains non-authorizing evidence.

parameters.name: object_id
parameters.description: Exact lowercase forty-character Git commit object identity

get.description: Returns secret-redacted bounded UTF-8 patches for a Git repository rooted exactly at the registered Workspace. Go follows no links, discovers no parent repository, starts no process, executes no hooks, uses no network, and grants no mutation authority.

get.summary: Inspect bounded history for one exact file path
get.description: Follows at most 512 first-parent commits and returns at most fifty metadata-only changes for one canonical repository-relative path. It does not infer renames or expose blob/patch content, identities, remotes, host roots, checkout, reference mutation, processes, hooks, network, or authority.

Returns at most fifty first-parent commit subjects and sixty-four local branch heads for a Git repository rooted exactly at the registered Workspace. Subjects are secret-redacted; author identities, commit bodies, remotes, host paths, processes, hooks, and network access are excluded.

Returns a bounded status-only projection for a Git repository rooted exactly at the registered Workspace. Go does not discover parent repositories, return file content, patches, remotes or local root paths, start a process, execute hooks, or use the network.

Performs one deterministic bounded scan over redacted UTF-8 Explorer projections. It follows no links, starts no indexer, returns canonical relative references and snippets only, and marks every result as non-authorizing evidence.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Normalized case-insensitive filename or redacted text query

BadRequest.description: Invalid path, query, method, or request body

Conflict.description: Idempotency key, Run, or active attempt changed

FailedPrecondition.description: The target model attempt is not active or cancellable

Forbidden.description: Request is outside the loopback security boundary

NotFound.description: Requested durable resource was not found

RequestEntityTooLarge.description: Control request body exceeded its hard limit

RequestTooLarge.description: Request target or query exceeded its hard limit

ResourceExhausted.description: Bounded response or resource limit was exhausted

BearerAuth.description: Process-scoped read token; never persisted by CyberAgent.

ControlBearerAuth.description: Distinct optional control token; cannot authorize read operations and is never persisted.
